validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_recovery_state_model.py
validation_results.summary: Run state validation requires all P4 recovery evidence fields and blocks unsafe incomplete state.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_resume_decisions.py
validation_results.summary: Resume decisions skip only on matching hashes, replay only declared output drift, route upstream lock drift to Human Gate, and block input drift, lock boundary, and unsafe state.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_review_recovery.py
validation_results.summary: Review recovery detects matching, missing, stale, and hash-changed review bindings without writing approvals.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_lock_rebuild_requests.py
validation_results.summary: Lock rebuild produces sorted request packets and dry-run evidence only, requires an existing source lock hash, and creates no requested lock file.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_recovery_invalidation.py
validation_results.summary: Invalidation records use stable reason codes and required structured fields sorted by reason code, node, and path.
Recovery rejects product semantic fill fields and never emits product requirements, page elements, layout rules, or business contracts.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository python -m drd_harness.cli.main runtime-boundary-check repository/src
validation_results.summary: Runtime source has no construction authority imports or direct construction authority path reads.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests
validation_results.summary: Full repository test suite passed with 442 tests.
